docket_entries.description: MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF AUG-11-2008 ASSIGNED TO SHORT CAUSE TRIAL CALENDAR ON AUG-11-2008 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 210, JAMES J MCBRIDE. JUDGE: JAMES J MCBRIDE; CLERK: E. BURA; REPORTER: SUSAN LEE CSR# 4280 (D206)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-10-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. PLAINTIFF CHALLENGES COMMISSIONER SLAVIT PURSUANT TO CIVIL CODE PROCEDURE 170.6. CLERK SHALL RESET FOR FUTURE DATE, IN COURTROOM TO BE DETERMINED. PLAINTIFF INDICATES THAT IT WILL NOT STIPULATE TO HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM. PLEASE NOTE ADA ACCOMODATIONS REQUIRED. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (DEPT 506 SITTING IN DEPT 212).
SMALL CLAIMS MATTER ON AUG-11-2008, DEPT. 210, JUDGE MCBRIDE: OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT ENTERED ON AUG-20-08, CLERK-BETH WILBER
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED NOV-03-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR COURT TRIAL COURT TRIAL SET FOR AUG-11-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NEXT ARTS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NELSON, KARI DEPARTMENT 210, JUDGE MCBRIDE: PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SUSTAIN BURDEN OF PROOF TO SHOW BREACH OF CONTRACT AND DAMAGES. MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY NEXT ARTS AS TO DEFENDANT NELSON, KARI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-10-2008 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
